div1.entryFree: Pursuivant, an officer at arms, of a lower rank than heralds: these grey locks, the --s of death, H6A II, 5, 5 (as forerunning and announcing death). send for his master with a p. H6B I, 3, 37. I told the p. R3 III, 4, 90. send out a p. at arms, V, 3, 59. --s, pages and footboys, H8 V, 2, 24.
